step_rationale: Natural anticoagulant regulating thrombin generation; impaired activity reflects thrombotic imbalance in acute coronary syndrome.
mechanism: Protein C deficiency or inactivation impairs anticoagulant regulation, promoting prothrombotic thrombus formation in acute MI.
